The '''Penetrator MB-450''', also colloquially called a '''Luxan Penetrator''',<ref name="GFT" /><ref name="Interlude" /> was a high powered [[Sporting blaster/Legends|sporting blaster]] designed by [[Luxan Personal Armaments, Ltd.]]<ref name="Rules" /><ref name="GFT" /> A Luxan Penetrator was the favored weapon of the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and gunslinger [[Bulduga/Legends|Bulduga]].<ref name="SWBlogGunslingers1">{{SW|url=news/so-uncivilized-great-gunslingers-in-star-wars-part-1|series=So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars|text=Part 1|nolive=1}}</ref>

==Characteristics==
[[File:Penetrator_MB-450_sporting_blaster_pistol.png|thumb|left|225px|A Penetrator MB-450.]]
A powerful and compact [[Sporting blaster/Legends|sporting blaster]], the MB-450 was able to deliver a massive punch-per-shot out of proportion to the blaster's class and energy requirements due to to a highly focused beam.<ref name="Rules" /><ref name="GFT" /> This focused beam was produced by a double-nested set of precision [[galven coil]]s; essentially double focused, the resulting beam was narrower than a normal bolt, but rivaled that of a [[heavy blaster pistol]] or even a [[blaster rifle]] in terms of penetrating power.<ref name="Rules" /><ref name="GFT" /> This double-series focusing came at a cost, however; the accuracy and narrowness of the bolt made it more difficult to aim, requiring practice at precision targeting to consistently hit ones target.<ref name="Rules" /><ref name="GFT" /><ref name="AEG" /> As a result of the over focusing, the MB-450 had a negligible [[stun]] setting.<ref name="AEG" />

Made to order by [[Luxan Personal Armaments, Ltd.]], each Penetrator was hand-crafted and often customized to the whims of a buyer for additional cost, though they were rarely personalized.<ref name="AEG" /> Each Penetrator was marked on its casing to identify its factory origin and manufacturing run - though these markings were often removed or obscured by the weapon's owner.<ref name="AEG" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
